title: cuphea pascuorum
intro: Cuphea pascuorum, also known as Smokebush or Mexican Heather, is a flowering shrub native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its clusters of small, white or pink flowers that resemble a puff of smoke, hence its common name. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cuphea pascuorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cuphea pascuorum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
